creator: skylord@vt.net.ru
text:
It's me... And submitted patch is mine...

On Tue, 28 Jul 2009 16:50:32 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of net-p2p/verlihub,
>
> Please note that PR ports/137220 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137220
